3121570.name: Wits' End Labyrinth
3121570.description:
You keep waking up in the same room — your bedroom. Every time you step out, you find yourself in the same maze.
...Or is it?
Is it really the same?

You don't remember. Everything seems to fade in and fade out — memories, thoughts... dreams.

They told you to keep personal belongings close. To memorise their stories, every day. To keep a log, so you wouldn’t forget who you are.
But in the end — does it really matter?

A Maze of Memories

Wits' End Labyrinth is a first-person psychological adventure where you wander through a maze stitched together from scraps of a forgotten life. It shifts and bends behind your back, as if the world itself has a mind of its own — a mind that's slowly slipping.

Your only clues are the objects left behind — a worn teddy bear, a faded photograph, a rusty key. Each item unlocks a fragment of your story, like puzzle pieces scattered through the corridors of your own mind.

Shifting Paths and Fragile Truths

The maze itself is never still. Some corridors twist, others seal themselves off. Some rotate entirely, reshuffling the world while you’re not looking.
The further you walk, the more you get to know it, hiding truths behind every corner, locked doors, and impossible paths.

With every object you find, the memories grow clearer — but so does the sense that something is just a little… strange.

Key Features

  • First-person psychological adventure gameplay

  • A maze that shifts, rotates, and rearranges itself as you explore

  • Personal objects to collect, each revealing a memory fragment

  • Environmental puzzles tied to memory discovery and progression

  • A world where reality, imagination, and memory blur together

Will you uncover the story before it fades for good?
3121570.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
